planner.title: FINANCE CHECK
planner.monthlySavingsHint: Amount you invest or save each month.
planner.savingsGrowthRateHint: Annual percentage increase of your savings rate. E.g. 3% if you expect salary increases.
planner.pensionMonthlyHint: Estimated statutory pension. Check your current pension statement.
planner.taxEtf: Used for wealth projection. Set your actual withdrawal rate below.
planner.etfWithdrawalRateHint: The percentage of your ETF portfolio you withdraw annually. Classic: 4% (Trinity Study). Used independently of the return rate for FIRE calculations.
planner.taxCash: Only interest income is considered for cash — no principal withdrawal. €1,000 allowance per person.
planner.retirementBudgetSub: Your planned monthly expenses in retirement
planner.inflationRateHint: Annual cost increase in retirement. 0% = no adjustment. Typical: 2% (ECB target).
planner.assetTaxRateTitle: Flat tax rate on asset income
planner.assetTaxRateHint: Enter the tax rate applied to your asset income. For simplicity, this rate is applied uniformly across all asset types. Typical: 25% capital gains tax + 5.5% solidarity surcharge = 26.375%. Including church tax approx. 27.8–28.6%.
planner.architectureTitle: The architecture of your financial freedom.
planner.gkvCapped: The maximum GKV amount of {{amount}} € / month will be considered (contribution cap).
planner.gkvUncapped: Approximately 21% of your asset income in the FIRE year will be considered (~{{amount}} € / month, max. 1,300 €).
planner.foundationLaid: of your financial foundation is laid.

prognosis.title: FORECAST
prognosis.disclaimerText: This forecast is for guidance only. Calculations are adjusted for inflation (real values). Actual market volatility may cause deviations. Regularly review your assumptions in

monteCarlo.title: Monte Carlo Simulation
monteCarlo.subtitle: FINANCIAL SUSTAINABILITY ANALYSIS
monteCarlo.successInfo: Your capital lasts until age 100 in {{count}} out of {{total}} simulated market cycles.
monteCarlo.simulationStart: The simulation starts with {{capital}} portfolio capital in the year {{year}} – based on your configuration.
monteCarlo.pessimisticDesc: The most unfavorable scenario with high inflation and low market growth.
monteCarlo.medianInheritanceDesc: Expected asset surplus at the end of the simulation period.
monteCarlo.chartHint: Tap on the chart for details
monteCarlo.volatilityInfo: Here you can adjust the volatility of market returns per year. Higher volatility leads to larger fluctuations in wealth development, which increases both opportunities and risks.
monteCarlo.expensesInfo: Here you must account for all costs: variable expenses, fixed costs (such as health insurance) and capital gains tax.

monteCarloProView.title: Monte Carlo Simulation Pro
monteCarloProView.subtitle: DYNAMIC SPENDING CONTROL
monteCarloProView.drawdownDesc: When your portfolio drops significantly from its all-time high, you automatically reduce your monthly expenses. Once it has recovered, you return to your normal spending.
monteCarloProView.drawdownThresholdHint: The percentage drop from the all-time high at which you reduce expenses. E.g. 20 = at -20% from ATH.
monteCarloProView.recoveryThresholdHint: The percentage rise from the trough at which you restore normal spending. E.g. 15 = at +15% from the low.
monteCarloProView.reducedWithdrawalHint: The amount you reduce your monthly expenses to during a market downturn.

welcome.title: Disclaimer & Methodology
welcome.subtitle: The path to financial freedom requires precision. Before we visualize your future, we need to define the mathematical foundations and uncertainties of our modeling.
welcome.section1Text: This module serves as a purely mathematical illustration of a theoretical starting point. The model marks the year as 'FIRE achieved' once your projected assets, multiplied by your chosen withdrawal rate, cover your calculated expenses.
welcome.section1Text2: Important: This calculation is a purely static snapshot of the entry date. It does not simulate market fluctuations and completely excludes the long-term performance of the portfolio after this point. Reaching this calculated target is not a guarantee of the long-term stability or lifelong availability of your capital. In particular, it is not checked whether your chosen withdrawal rate exceeds the actual net return, which can lead to unnoticed capital depletion (bankruptcy risk).
welcome.section2Text: We subject your strategy to a virtual stress test using 1,000 (or 10,000) random market movements. The resulting success probabilities are statistical approximations, not guarantees.
welcome.section2Text2: Past market cycles are not a reliable indicator of future developments. Real market movements can deviate significantly from these simulations.
welcome.section3Text: All values ​​are displayed based on your self-selected inflation rate and taxes. Since taxes and social security contributions are the biggest unknown of any strategy, the app does not offer automatic forecasts, but only configurable templates. The calculation is performed strictly according to the percentages and fixed amounts you define.
welcome.section3Text2: Note: Since you define these parameters yourself, it is your responsibility to adjust them in the event of changes in legislation or personal status (e.g., statutory/private health insurance). The app cannot predict future contribution developments or tax reforms. Tax laws may change over the FIRE period (30+ years).
welcome.section4Text: This tool is a purely mathematical simulation model for illustrative purposes. It does not constitute investment advice, tax advice, or retirement planning. The results are purely hypothetical and do not represent a recommendation for a specific investment strategy.
welcome.section4Text2: Any liability for financial losses or decisions made based on this software is fully excluded. Use is at your own risk. Despite the utmost care in modeling, mathematical errors, software inaccuracies, rounding differences, or logical misinterpretations may occur. The accuracy of the results cannot be guaranteed at any time.
welcome.section5Text: Your sensitive financial and asset data remains exclusively local on your device. Your financial plans are not transferred to external servers.
welcome.section5Text2: Note: To provide app functionalities and display advertising formats, technical device data (e.g., advertising ID) is transferred to third-party providers (Google AdMob). Details can be found in our privacy policy.
welcome.consent1Desc: I have fully reviewed the methodological principles and technical limitations of the simulation.
welcome.consent2Desc: I am aware that this model calculation does not replace financial advice and that the risk of capital depletion remains.
welcome.consent3Desc: I agree to the local storage of my financial data. I acknowledge that this app is ad-supported and that a separate request for data protection consent (Google AdMob) will be made if this consent has not already been given.

tax.title: FIRE LEDGER
tax.fireCalculationSub: The standard without special conditions – your baseline forecast.
tax.hardcoreFireSub: What if I reduce my variable expenses by 50%?
tax.partTimeSub: What if I work one day less from now on? (Reduce savings rate by 30%)

tax.crashSub: Will my plan withstand a crash next year?

calculationInfo.title: The Logic of the Calculation
calculationInfo.subtitle: A look inside the mathematical engine room. Learn how our models work and where they reach their limits.
calculationInfo.section1Text: The FIRE target capital (FIRE-Target) is the most powerful lever, as it is based exclusively on your manually calibrated retirement expenses and depends on a conservatively chosen withdrawal rate. The goal: to accumulate enough capital to permanently cover expenses – without examining the long-term capital stability of a portfolio.
calculationInfo.section1Warning1: INTEREST AND REAL RETURN ARE TREATED AS EQUAL
calculationInfo.section1Warning2: CALCULATION: NO INFLATION OR TAX ADJUSTMENT
calculationInfo.section2Text: The calculation of the time to financial independence is based on your savings plan and a constant annual assumed return. The compound interest effect is calculated monthly and applied to the entire portfolio.
calculationInfo.section2Warning: WARNING: This compound interest calculation runs on a month-to-month basis and assumes constant returns. Real market volatility is not modeled.
calculationInfo.section3Text: The simulation of retirement living expenses shows how your capital develops over time. The withdrawal rate determines how much capital is withdrawn annually – without accounting for market fluctuations.
calculationInfo.section3Bullet1: Mathematical capital depletion without market volatility
calculationInfo.section3Bullet2: Capital value trajectory over the entire planning horizon
calculationInfo.section3TaxNote: Tax calculation is performed according to your configured percentages
calculationInfo.section4Text: We simulate 10,000 possible market trajectories to assess the robustness of your strategy. This is not a promise, but a stochastic assessment based on historical volatility patterns.
calculationInfo.legalText1: This tool performs exclusively mathematical model calculations based on your inputs. It is not a financial product and does not constitute investment advice.
calculationInfo.legalText2: Capital market investments are subject to risks, including total loss. The calculations are based on assumptions that may prove incorrect at any time.
calculationInfo.legalText3: Historical returns are not a reliable indicator of future performance.
calculationInfo.legalText4: The scenarios shown are mathematical snapshots and do not represent individual investment strategies or recommendations.

privacy.line_1: This privacy policy is available in English and other languages.
privacy.line_2: To use a different language, simply change the language settings of your device.
privacy.line_4: Thank you for visiting our website/app. We take the protection of your data very seriously and would like to provide you with an overview of how we handle your data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), European data protection laws, the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), and California law.
privacy.line_6: The party responsible for processing your data and publishing this app is:
privacy.line_12: If you have any questions or concerns regarding data protection, please contact us at christian.developer.app@gmail.com.
privacy.line_15: We use cookies and similar technologies to provide you with personalised advertising and to improve the performance of our website/app. This includes cookies stored on your device. These technologies help us save your preferences and optimise the user experience.
privacy.line_16: We also use Local Storage to store financial data locally. Your data always remains on your device.
privacy.line_17: - LocalStorage: LocalStorage is a powerful local storage mechanism that allows web applications to store data on your device, persisting even after the browser is closed. On our platform, we exclusively use LocalStorage and cookies (for advertising). For example, your financial data is stored here so it is always accessible to you, regardless of whether the browser is open or not.
privacy.line_18: 3. Collection and Processing of Data by AdMob and AdSense
privacy.line_19: We use AdMob and AdSense to show you personalised advertising. These services use cookies and similar technologies to collect data about your use of the website/app and to deliver tailored advertising. The data collected by these services may include:
privacy.line_21: - Information about your interactions with the website/app
privacy.line_23:
The collected data is processed in accordance with Google's privacy policies. For more information, please refer to the privacy policies of Google AdMob and Google AdSense.

To obtain your consent for personalised advertising, we use the Google User Messaging Platform (UMP), which is based on the Transparency and Consent Framework (TCF) Version 2.2 by IAB Europe. When you first launch the app, or after your previous consent has expired, you will be shown a consent prompt where you can specify whether and to what extent you agree to data processing. The recorded consents relate to, among other things, personalised ads, measurement, and sharing with third parties. Your selection is stored locally and can be revoked or adjusted at any time.
privacy.line_25: We do not sell any of your data. Data collected by AdMob and AdSense is subject to the respective provider's privacy policies.
privacy.line_27: You have the right to request information about the data stored about you, to request its correction or deletion, and to restrict its processing. As we do not store any data ourselves, these rights relate to the data collected by AdMob and AdSense. Please contact the respective providers for further information and to exercise your rights.
privacy.line_29: We strive to protect your data through appropriate technical and organisational measures. The security of your data is important to us, and we apply security-relevant measures in accordance with legal requirements.
privacy.line_31: Personal data refers to information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person. In this context, personal data may be collected and processed by AdMob and AdSense.
privacy.line_33: We reserve the right to amend this privacy policy to comply with legal requirements or to reflect changes in our data processing practices. Please review this statement regularly to stay informed.
